name: feishu-connector
description: Connect an agent workspace to Feishu/Lark through the official OpenAPI MCP server.

interface.shortDescription: Read and automate Feishu/Lark docs, chats, calendars, and bitables.
interface.longDescription: Feishu Connector bundles an agent skill and MCP configuration for the official Feishu/Lark OpenAPI MCP server. Users bring their own Feishu/Lark app credentials and grant only the scopes needed for their task.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use feishu-connector to help me work with Feishu/Lark.
